title: Multiply by 6
description: Multiply 6 times a number less than or equal to 10.
topic_path: Module 3: Multiplication and division with units of 0, 1, 6–9, and multiples of 10
Topic A: The properties of multiplication and division

assessment_items.question_content:
**Multiply.**  
*Hint: Use the image below to help solve $6 \times 2$.*   

$6 \times 2 = $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Multiply.**  
*Hint: Use the image below to help solve $3 \times 6$.*   

$3 \times 6 = $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]


[[☃ image 1]]
hints:
There are $\blueD3$ groups of $\maroonD{6}$.



[[☃ image 1]]




$\blueD{3} \times \maroonD{6} = \underbrace{\maroonD{6} + \maroonD6 + \maroonD6 }_{\blueD{3}\maroonD{\text{ sixes}}} = \greenD{18}$
$\blueD{3} \times \maroonD{6} = \greenD{18}$

options.alt: Three groups of 6 apples. Each group of apples has a circle around it.

[[☃ image 1]]




$\blueD{1} \times \maroonD{6} = \underbrace{\maroonD{6}  }_{\blueD{1}\maroonD{\text{ six}}} = \greenD{6}$
$\blueD{1} \times \maroonD{6} = \greenD{6}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Multiply.**  
*Hint: Use the number line below to help solve $5 \times 6$.* 

$5 \times 6 = $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]


[[☃ image 1]]
hints:
The number line shows $\blueD{5}$ equal jumps of $\maroonD{6}$ units.


[[☃ image 1]]



$\blueD{5} \times \maroonD{6} = \underbrace{\maroonD{6} + \maroonD{6} + \maroonD{6} + \maroonD{6}+ \maroonD{6}}_{\blueD{5}\maroonD{\text{ sixes}}} = \greenD{30}$
$\blueD{5} \times \maroonD{6} = \greenD{30}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Multiply.**  
*Hint: Use the array below to help solve $6 \times 1$.*   

$6 \times 1 = $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]


[[☃ image 1]]
hints:
The array shows $\blueD6$ rows with $\purpleC1$ dot in each row.


[[☃ image 1]]

$\blueD{6} \times \purpleC{1} = \underbrace{\purpleC{1} + \purpleC{1} + \purpleC{1} + \purpleC{1} + \purpleC{1} + \purpleC{1}}_{\blueD{6}\purpleC{\text{ ones}}} = \greenD{6}$
$\blueD6 \times \purpleC1 =\greenD{6}$

options.alt: An array of dots arranged in 6 rows of 1 dot each.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Multiply.**  
*Hint: Use the array below to help solve $10 \times 6$.*   

$10 \times 6 = $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]


[[☃ image 1]]
hints:
The array shows $\blueD{10}$ rows with $\purpleC6$ dots in each row.

[[☃ image 1]]

$\blueD{10} \times \purpleC{6} = \underbrace{\purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6}+ \purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6}}_{\blueD{10}\purpleC{\text{ sixes}}} = \greenD{60}$
$\blueD{10} \times \purpleC6 =\greenD{60}$

[[☃ explanation 1]]

options.alt: An array of dots arranged in 10 rows of 6 dots each.

$\blueD{2} \times \purpleC{6} = \underbrace{\purpleC{6} + \purpleC{6}}_{\blueD{2}\purpleC{\text{ sixes}}} = \greenD{12}$
$\blueD{2} \times \purpleC6 =\greenD{12}$
